title: Acer violaceum
taxonomy: Acer violaceum is a species of maple tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. However, it's worth noting that some sources may group the genus Acer in the family Sapindaceae or Sapindales, while others may place it in the family Sapindales within the clade Rosanae. The most recent classification groups the genus Acer in the family Sapindaceae, within the order Sapindales. The Sapindaceae family is a group of flowering plants that includes other species of maples as well as other related trees and shrubs. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Acer violaceum.
